title: Reinforcement Learning Agent Loop in a Grid World
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative interaction cycle between an RL agent and the grid world environment.
relationships: Agent observes State S_t -> Agent selects Action A_t -> Environment receives Action A_t -> Environment emits Reward R_{t+1} and New State S_{t+1} -> Agent receives (R_{t+1}, S_{t+1}) and updates its policy
